company_description: SOTI is an enterprise mobility management (EMM) software company offering the SOTI ONE Platform — an integrated suite of products for managing, securing, and optimizing business-critical mobile devices, rugged hardware, printers, and IoT endpoints across industries such as retail, healthcare, transportation, and field services.

products.name: SOTI ONE Platform
products.description: An integrated enterprise mobility management platform that unifies device management, analytics, app development, IoT connectivity, and identity across all mobile and rugged endpoints.

products.name: SOTI MobiControl
products.description: A comprehensive MDM/EMM solution for enrolling, configuring, securing, and remotely managing smartphones, tablets, rugged devices, and computers across Android, iOS, Windows, and Linux.

products.name: SOTI XSight
products.description: An advanced analytics and diagnostics tool that provides real-time visibility, performance monitoring, and troubleshooting intelligence for enterprise mobile device fleets; includes LEARN AI features via SOTI Stella.

products.name: SOTI Snap
products.description: A low-code mobile application development platform that enables businesses to rapidly build, deploy, and manage enterprise mobile apps without extensive coding.

products.name: SOTI Connect
products.description: An IoT and printer management solution that extends enterprise mobility management to industrial printers, scanners, and other connected non-mobile endpoints.

products.name: SOTI Identity
products.description: A centralized identity and access management service for the SOTI ONE Platform that provides single sign-on, role-based access control, and authentication across SOTI products.

products.name: SOTI Pulse
products.description: A community and support hub that connects SOTI customers, partners, and administrators for peer discussion, case logging, and marketplace access.

products.name: SOTI Stella
products.description: An AI-powered assistant embedded within the SOTI ONE Platform that provides predictive insights, anomaly detection, and intelligent recommendations for mobile device management; LEARN AI feature.

products.name: SOTI University
products.description: SOTI's official learning management system offering on-demand, self-paced courses and certifications for mobility professionals working with SOTI ONE Platform products.

competitive_products.competitive_context: Workspace ONE UEM is a leading enterprise MDM/EMM platform that directly competes with SOTI MobiControl for unified endpoint management across mobile and desktop devices.
Microsoft Intune is a cloud-based MDM/MAM solution competing with SOTI MobiControl, particularly strong in Windows and Microsoft 365 environments.
Jamf Pro is an Apple-focused MDM platform competing with SOTI MobiControl for iOS and macOS device management in enterprise environments.
Ivanti Neurons for MDM competes with SOTI MobiControl for enterprise mobile device management, particularly in rugged device and field service scenarios.
Zebra's device analytics and management services compete with SOTI XSight for rugged device fleet visibility, though Zebra is also a SOTI hardware partner.
SureMDM is a unified endpoint management solution competing with SOTI MobiControl, particularly in rugged device and kiosk management scenarios.
Honeywell's device analytics platform competes with SOTI XSight for rugged device fleet performance monitoring, though Honeywell is also a SOTI hardware partner.

partnership_signals.channel_program: SOTI Altitude Program (Reseller, MSP, Distributor, OEM, Platform, Technology Partner tracks)
partnership_signals.ilt_vilt: SOTI University offers on-demand self-paced courses; instructor-led options not confirmed

SOTI ONE Platform — Connecting Everything Your business-critical mobile operations have never been bigger or more important. With more devices, operating systems (OS) and remote workers, everything must be fast, secure and reliable. The SOTI ONE Platform is an innovative, integrated management solution that maximizes the ROI of your business-critical mobile devices and printers. It reduces the cost, complexity and downtime of your mobile operations and delivers actionable insights to help you make data-driven decisions. Workers are more efficient because devices are more reliable and packed with the tools, data and apps needed to get the job done - fast. Manage your essential mobile devices and printers for total control while increasing the effectiveness of your mobile operations with the SOTI ONE Platform. Click here to learn how your business can experience the SOTI ONE Platform. Mobility Management SOTI MobiControl makes Enter
